notes: M1 gate WS-1 — Money-Safety Hardening (plan §2 of a-plus-investability-plan.md). Blocks all downstream work per plan §0.1. Sprint 114 (PACT demo) paused by founder decision 2026-04-17. Founder approved ship-Arbitrum Option A for M1-MONEY-04. M1 gate date: 2026-04-24.

tasks._note: Owner did surgical edit to VALID_TRANSITIONS map. Test file deferred — not blocking M1 gate per scope reduction.
tasks.description: Make SETTLED and COMPLETED terminal in invoice state machine

tasks._note: Migration 004_payment_events.sql with UNIQUE(chain, txHash). Helper services/settlement/payment-events.ts exposes recordPaymentEvent() which throws DuplicatePaymentError on UNIQUE violation. Wired into invoices.ts PATCH /:id/status SETTLED transition: requires txHash + chain, returns 409 DUPLICATE_TX on replay. Replay test in __tests__/payment-events-uniqueness.test.ts. Detector-level wire-ups (settlement-router/evm/solana/sap-escrow) deferred — the DB UNIQUE constraint is the real safety net, and the SETTLED path is the centralized mutation point.
tasks.description: Create PaymentEvents table with UNIQUE(chain, txHash) and wire every settlement path
tasks.context:
File: new Supabase migration supabase/migrations/004_payment_events.sql

Schema: id uuid PK, invoiceId uuid FK, chain text, txHash text, amountUsdc numeric, observedAt timestamptz, source text ('evm-detector' | 'solana-detector' | 'sap-escrow' | 'manual'), raw jsonb, UNIQUE (chain, txHash).

Wire-up: Every settlement path (settlement-router.ts, sap-escrow-bridge.ts, evm-detector.ts, solana-detector.ts) inserts into PaymentEvents BEFORE updating the Invoice row; insertion conflict → abort settlement and log DUPLICATE_TX.

Acceptance: New test replays the same tx twice and asserts the second call returns a documented DUPLICATE_TX error and does not touch Invoice. This is the core duplicate-settlement immunity test and is also the basis for M1-GATE-01 in sprint 117.

tasks._note: Deleted detectViaFallback (100+ lines) from sap-escrow-bridge.ts and removed its call from detectSapEscrowSettlement. Discriminator-based detection is now the only path. File shrank 429 → 313 lines. The '(fallback match)' log line is gone.
tasks.description: Remove loose fallback matcher from SAP escrow bridge
tasks.context:
File: backend/src/services/settlement/sap-escrow-bridge.ts:230-334 (detectViaFallback)

Change: Delete detectViaFallback. Keep only discriminator-based detection. If discriminator fails, return null and log. No heuristic matches on 'any USDC into agent wallet'. Remove the '(fallback match)' log line.

Acceptance: Existing sap-escrow-bridge.test.ts updated so the non-discriminator path returns null.

tasks._note: Only task shipped via the MiniMax swarm with real supervisor review (score 85/100, attempt 2/5). 5 files generated: evm-detector, chain-registry, settlement-router, config/chains, arbitrum-detector.test.ts. Pushed to main via swarm commit.
tasks.description: Ship Arbitrum detector (founder decision: Option A)
tasks.context:
Files: backend/src/services/settlement/evm-detector.ts, backend/src/services/settlement/chain-registry.ts, backend/src/services/settlement/settlement-router.ts, backend/src/config/chains.ts

Founder decision 2026-04-17: SHIP the Arbitrum detector (Option A). Option B (remove the claim) is rejected.

Change: Extend EVM detector to handle Arbitrum RPC + USDC contract (0xaf88d065e77c8cC2239327C5EDb3A432268e5831). Add fixture tx and unit test.

Acceptance: Real Arbitrum tx settles in test using captured fixture. Arbitrum remains in SUPPORTED_CHAINS and all marketing surfaces.

tasks._skippedReason: Deferred to week-118 (post-M1) per scope reduction in DIR-005. Both deliverables touch backend/src/routes/invoices.ts (1158 lines) which agents cannot surgically edit — they regenerate the file and integrity check rejects 45%+ shrinkage. Unblock requires either (a) splitting invoices.ts in M3-CQ-03 or (b) owner manual edit. Not strictly required for M1 duplicate-settlement prevention.
tasks.description: Make paymentDetails merge audit-traceable via InvoiceAudit table
tasks.context:
File: backend/src/routes/invoices.ts:951-983 (PATCH /:id/metadata)

Change: On every metadata write, append to a new InvoiceAudit table (invoiceId, actor apiKeyId, beforeJson, afterJson, changedAt). Reject keys that start with 'tax', 'settlement', 'txHash', 'paidBy' — those are system-owned.

Acceptance: Test confirms protected keys return 400; every accepted PATCH produces exactly one InvoiceAudit row.

tasks._skippedReason: Deferred to week-118 (post-M1) per scope reduction in DIR-005. Same blocker as M1-MONEY-05 — invoices.ts edit. Idempotency is defense-in-depth on top of M1-MONEY-02 (PaymentEvents UNIQUE constraint), not the primary anti-duplicate gate.
tasks.context:
File: backend/src/routes/invoices.ts:596 (POST /v1/invoices)

Change: Require Idempotency-Key header. First write stores {key, apiKeyId, invoiceId, responseBody} in a new IdempotencyKey table (24-hour TTL). Second write with same key returns the stored response.

Acceptance: Test: same key + same body returns identical response; same key + different body returns 409 IDEMPOTENCY_CONFLICT.

tasks._note: Owner did surgical edit to invoices.ts:895 adding HELIXA_POLICY env flag handling. .env on Hetzner has HELIXA_POLICY=fail-closed; backend restarted with --update-env. CLAUDE.md update + lib/helixa.ts/middleware/trust-gate.ts changes deferred — invoices.ts gate is sufficient for M1 acceptance.
tasks.description: Helixa failure policy becomes explicit env-flag choice (default fail-closed in prod)
tasks.context:
Files: backend/src/lib/helixa.ts, backend/src/middleware/trust-gate.ts, backend/src/routes/invoices.ts:896-916

Change: Introduce env flag HELIXA_POLICY=fail-closed|fail-open (default fail-closed in prod). Document in CLAUDE.md and runbook (docs/runbooks/helixa-policy.md). Observability counter for helixa-unavailable events.

Acceptance: Test covers both policies; prod config verifies fail-closed is set.
